User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account on the GameFlashX platform, tracking their identity, balance, location, and payout details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for identification and communication.

username.description: The user's gamer tag or unique handle.

balance.description: The user's current reward balance or points.

country.description: The user's detected country via geolocation.

paypalEmail.description: The user's verified PayPal email for cash payouts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

Reward.title: Reward
Reward.description: Represents a digital gift card or premium reward available on the GameFlashX platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Reward entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who is associated with this reward.

name.description: The common name of the reward.

amount.description: The monetary value of the reward in USD.

status.description: The current status of the reward (e.g., pending, verified).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this reward was recorded.

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Records a user's interaction or completion of specific tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Activity entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who performed this activity.

type.description: The classification of the activity (quiz, game, etc.).

status.description: The completion status of the activity.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the activity was initiated.

definition.description: Stores specific rewards claimed or earned by a user.
Records a user's completed or pending activities.

firestore.reasoning: Standard hierarchical user-centric structure for security and scalability.
